## What does this PR do?

<!-- Config addition / bug fix / feature — one line -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Config PRs: tested personally on real hardware (not just copied from docs)
- [ ] Config PRs: `status` field reflects actual experience (`tested` / `partial` / `broken`)
- [ ] Code PRs: tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format src tests` applied
- [ ] `pytest` passes

## Hardware / environment (for config PRs)

- GPU: <!-- e.g. AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX -->
- Chip: <!-- e.g. gfx1100 -->
- ROCm / HIP version: <!-- e.g. 6.3.1 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 -->
